{{Infobox location
| name = Hall of Judgment
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Hall of Judgment]] is a shining golden tower on an artificial hill.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A crack echoed through the [[Hall of Judgment]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Hall of Judgment]] is a golden edifice belonging to the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c20">''Dreadgod'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Hall of Judgment]] is located in [[Sanctum]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
